# chore(kaizen): bump 2.10.0 -> 2.10.1 (security patch)

     Next session: review, then promote to a real journal entry OR delete. -->

**Commit**: `1ab82494fd75` — chore(kaizen): bump 2.10.0 -> 2.10.1 (security patch)

**Body**:

Security-reviewer feedback on PR #587:
  * C2 (HIGH) — Tier 2 security tests added (classified payload_hash,
    tenant_id scrub, vendor-SDK brand non-leak)
  * H1 (HIGH) — tenant_id hashed via _hash_tenant_id() before every
    INFO/WARN emission (5 exporter sites + 2 diagnostics sites)
  * H2 (HIGH) — JsonlSink resolves path at __init__ and opens with
    O_NOFOLLOW + 0o600; symlink at destination raises OSError instead
    of being followed (4 regression tests)
  * M1 (MED) — TraceExporter._pending_tasks set + add_done_callback
    retain async sink tasks against GC; new aclose() drains pending
    tasks on shutdown (3 tests)

Same-PR patch per rules/autonomous-execution.md 'Fix-Immediately When
Review Surfaces Same-Class Gap Within Shard Budget' — all 4 findings
were same-class observability-security, fit within shard budget.

No breaking changes; public API gains additive aclose() only.

PR#6 of issue #567.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
